title: Worldâ€™s Largest Green Hydrogen And Ammonia Plant Officially Commissioned â€” Powered Entirely Offâ€‘Grid
content: Envision Energy has officially commissioned the 320,000 tonnes-a-year, 500MW first phase of its 2.5GW green hydrogen and ammonia plant in Chifeng, China â€” currently the largest in the world by installed electrolyser capacity. The project had produced its first molecules in early 2024 from electrolysers made in-house by Envision. y leveraging green ammonia as a stable transport and storage medium, Envision has unlocked a practical path to scaling hydrogen across heavy industries.
author: Analysts Account
